;;;116    {
;;;117        uint32_t bitFieldBitLen = 0,bytetmpLen= 0;
000002  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000004  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;118        /* Processing only writable bool Enum type data */
;;;119        if(0x01 == aFlag->flagHeater)

00000c  b103              CBZ      r3,|L1.16|
;;;120        {
;;;121            bitFieldBitLen += Heater_LEN;
00000e  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1

;;;122        }
;;;123        if(0x01 == aFlag->flagIn_WaterPump)

000016  b103              CBZ      r3,|L1.26|
;;;124        {
;;;125            bitFieldBitLen += In_WaterPump_LEN;
000018  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
                  |L1.26|
;;;126        }
;;;127        if(0x01 == aFlag->flagOut_WaterPump)
00001a  7813              LDRB     r3,[r2,#0]
00001c  f3c30380          UBFX     r3,r3,#2,#1
000020  b103              CBZ      r3,|L1.36|
;;;128        {
;;;129            bitFieldBitLen += Out_WaterPump_LEN;
000022  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
                  |L1.36|
;;;130        }
;;;131        if(0x01 == aFlag->flagFill_In_Light)

00002a  b103              CBZ      r3,|L1.46|
;;;132        {
;;;133            bitFieldBitLen += Fill_In_Light_LEN;
00002c  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1

;;;134        }
;;;135        if(0x01 == aFlag->flagServo)

000034  b103              CBZ      r3,|L1.56|
;;;136        {
;;;137            bitFieldBitLen += Servo_LEN;
000036  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
                  |L1.56|
;;;138        }
;;;139    
;;;140        if(0 == bitFieldBitLen)
000038  b909              CBNZ     r1,|L1.62|
;;;141        {
;;;142            bytetmpLen = 0;
00003a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00003c  e007              B        |L1.78|
                  |L1.62|
;;;143        }
;;;144        else
;;;145        {
;;;146            if(0 == bitFieldBitLen%8)
00003e  f0010307          AND      r3,r1,#7

;;;147            {
;;;148                bytetmpLen = bitFieldBitLen/8;
000044  08c8              LSRS     r0,r1,#3
000046  e002              B        |L1.78|
                  |L1.72|
;;;149            }
;;;150            else
;;;151            {
;;;152                bytetmpLen = bitFieldBitLen/8 + 1;
000048  2301              MOVS     r3,#1
00004a  eb0300d1          ADD      r0,r3,r1,LSR #3
                  |L1.78|
;;;153            }
;;;154        }
;;;155        return bytetmpLen;
;;;156    }

;;;328

;;;175    
;;;176        if((NULL == issuedData) || (NULL == info) ||(NULL == dataPoints))

;;;184        {
;;;185            if(-1 == gizByteOrderExchange((uint8_t *)&elongateP0FormTmp.devDatapointFlag,DATAPOINT_FLAG_LEN))

;;;198            info->num++;

;;;201        }

;;;220        {

;;;222            info->num++;

;;;225        }

;;;230            info->num++;

;;;358        }

;;;364            return -1;
000036  f04f30ff          MOV      r0,#0xffffffff
                  |L4.58|
;;;365        }
;;;366    
;;;367        /*** Fill the bit ***/
;;;368        if(gizwitsProtocol.waitReportDatapointFlag.flagHeater)
;;;369        {
;;;370            gizVarlenCompressValue(bitFieldOffset,Heater_LEN,(uint8_t *)&allDatapointByteBuf[byteFieldOffset],dataPoints->valueHeater);
;;;371            bitFieldOffset += Heater_LEN;
;;;372        }
;;;373        if(gizwitsProtocol.waitReportDatapointFlag.flagIn_WaterPump)
;;;374        {
;;;375            gizVarlenCompressValue(bitFieldOffset,In_WaterPump_LEN,(uint8_t *)&allDatapointByteBuf[byteFieldOffset],dataPoints->valueIn_WaterPump);
;;;376            bitFieldOffset += In_WaterPump_LEN;
;;;377        }
;;;378        if(gizwitsProtocol.waitReportDatapointFlag.flagOut_WaterPump)
;;;379        {
;;;380            gizVarlenCompressValue(bitFieldOffset,Out_WaterPump_LEN,(uint8_t *)&allDatapointByteBuf[byteFieldOffset],dataPoints->valueOut_WaterPump);
;;;381            bitFieldOffset += Out_WaterPump_LEN;
;;;382        }
;;;383        if(gizwitsProtocol.waitReportDatapointFlag.flagFill_In_Light)
;;;384        {
;;;385            gizVarlenCompressValue(bitFieldOffset,Fill_In_Light_LEN,(uint8_t *)&allDatapointByteBuf[byteFieldOffset],dataPoints->valueFill_In_Light);
;;;386            bitFieldOffset += Fill_In_Light_LEN;
;;;387        }
;;;388        if(gizwitsProtocol.waitReportDatapointFlag.flagServo)
;;;389        {
;;;390            gizVarlenCompressValue(bitFieldOffset,Servo_LEN,(uint8_t *)&allDatapointByteBuf[byteFieldOffset],dataPoints->valueServo);
;;;391            bitFieldOffset += Servo_LEN;
;;;392        }
;;;393    
;;;394        /* The bit segment is assembled and the offset of the value segment is calculated */
;;;395        if(0 == bitFieldOffset)
;;;396        {
;;;397            bitFieldByteLen = 0;
;;;398        }
;;;399        else
;;;400        {
;;;401            if(0 == bitFieldOffset%8)
;;;402            {
;;;403                bitFieldByteLen = bitFieldOffset/8;
;;;404            }
;;;405            else
;;;406            {
;;;407                bitFieldByteLen = bitFieldOffset/8 + 1;
;;;408            }
;;;409        }
;;;410        /** Bitwise byte order conversion **/
;;;411        if(bitFieldByteLen > 1)
;;;412        {
;;;413            gizByteOrderExchange((uint8_t *)&allDatapointByteBuf[byteFieldOffset],bitFieldByteLen);
;;;414        }
;;;415        
;;;416        byteFieldOffset += bitFieldByteLen;//Offset the number of bytes occupied by the bit segment
;;;417    
;;;418        /*** Handle the value segment ***/
;;;419    
;;;420        if(gizwitsProtocol.waitReportDatapointFlag.flagTemperature)
;;;421        {
;;;422            devStatusTmp.valueTemperature = gizY2X(Temperature_RATIO,  Temperature_ADDITION, dataPoints->valueTemperature);

;;;424            byteFieldOffset += Temperature_LEN;
;;;425        }
;;;426        if(gizwitsProtocol.waitReportDatapointFlag.flagWaterLevel)
;;;427        {
;;;428            devStatusTmp.valueWaterLevel = gizY2X(WaterLevel_RATIO,  WaterLevel_ADDITION, dataPoints->valueWaterLevel); 
;;;429            gizMemcpy((uint8_t *)&allDatapointByteBuf[byteFieldOffset],(uint8_t *)&devStatusTmp.valueWaterLevel,WaterLevel_LEN);
;;;430            byteFieldOffset += WaterLevel_LEN;
;;;431        }
;;;432        if(gizwitsProtocol.waitReportDatapointFlag.flagLight)
;;;433        {
;;;434            devStatusTmp.valueLight = gizY2X(Light_RATIO,  Light_ADDITION, dataPoints->valueLight); 
;;;435            gizMemcpy((uint8_t *)&allDatapointByteBuf[byteFieldOffset],(uint8_t *)&devStatusTmp.valueLight,Light_LEN);
;;;436            byteFieldOffset += Light_LEN;
;;;437        }
;;;438        if(gizwitsProtocol.waitReportDatapointFlag.flagTurbidity)
;;;439        {
;;;440            devStatusTmp.valueTurbidity = gizY2X(Turbidity_RATIO,  Turbidity_ADDITION, dataPoints->valueTurbidity);

;;;990        ret = uartWrite((uint8_t *)&errorType, sizeof(protocolErrorType_t));
;;;991        if(ret < 0)
;;;992        {
;;;993            GIZWITS_LOG("ERR: uart write error %d \n", ret);
;;;994        }
;;;995    
;;;996        return ret;
;;;997    }

                          AREA ||i.gizProtocolGetDeviceInfo||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                          REQUIRE _printf_d
                          REQUIRE _printf_int_dec

;;;926    {

;;;927        int32_t ret = 0;

                  gizProtocolGetOnePacket PROC
;;;689    */
;;;690    static int8_t gizProtocolGetOnePacket(rb_t *rb, uint8_t *gizdata, uint16_t *len)
000000  e92d4ffe          PUSH     {r1-r11,lr}
;;;691    {
000004  4680              MOV      r8,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4617              MOV      r7,r2
;;;692        int32_t ret = 0;
00000a  f04f0b00          MOV      r11,#0
;;;693        uint8_t sum = 0;
00000e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000010  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
;;;694        int32_t i = 0;
000012  4681              MOV      r9,r0
;;;695        uint8_t tmpData;
;;;696        uint16_t tmpLen = 0;
000014  4682              MOV      r10,r0
;;;697        uint16_t tmpCount = 0;
000016  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;698        static uint8_t protocolFlag = 0;
;;;699        static uint16_t protocolCount = 0;
;;;700        static uint8_t lastData = 0;
;;;701        static uint8_t debugCount = 0;
;;;702        uint8_t *protocolBuff = gizdata;
000018  4634              MOV      r4,r6
;;;703        protocolHead_t *head = NULL;
00001a  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;704    
;;;705        if((NULL == rb) || (NULL == gizdata) ||(NULL == len))
00001c  f1b80f00          CMP      r8,#0
000020  d001              BEQ      |L10.38|
000022  b106              CBZ      r6,|L10.38|
000024  b937              CBNZ     r7,|L10.52|
                  |L10.38|
;;;706        {
;;;707            GIZWITS_LOG("gizProtocolGetOnePacket Error , Illegal Param\n");
000026  a055              ADR      r0,|L10.380|
000028  f7fffffe          BL       __2printf
;;;708            return -1;
00002c  f04f30ff          MOV      r0,#0xffffffff
                  |L10.48|
;;;709        }
;;;710    
;;;711        tmpLen = rbCanRead(rb);
;;;712        if(0 == tmpLen)
;;;713        {
;;;714            return -1;
;;;715        }
;;;716    
;;;717        for(i=0; i<tmpLen; i++)
;;;718        {
;;;719            ret = rbRead(rb, &tmpData, 1);
;;;720            if(0 != ret)
;;;721            {
;;;722                if((0xFF == lastData) && (0xFF == tmpData))
;;;723                {
;;;724                    if(0 == protocolFlag)
;;;725                    {
;;;726                        protocolBuff[0] = 0xFF;
;;;727                        protocolBuff[1] = 0xFF;
;;;728                        protocolCount = 2;
;;;729                        protocolFlag = 1;
;;;730                    }
;;;731                    else
;;;732                    {
;;;733                        if((protocolCount > 4) && (protocolCount != tmpCount))
;;;734                        {
;;;735                            protocolBuff[0] = 0xFF;
;;;736                            protocolBuff[1] = 0xFF;
;;;737                            protocolCount = 2;
;;;738                        }
;;;739                    }
;;;740                }
;;;741                else if((0xFF == lastData) && (0x55 == tmpData))
;;;742                {
;;;743                }
;;;744                else
;;;745                {
;;;746                    if(1 == protocolFlag)
;;;747                    {
;;;748                        protocolBuff[protocolCount] = tmpData;
;;;749                        protocolCount++;
;;;750    
;;;751                        if(protocolCount > 4)
;;;752                        {
;;;753                            head = (protocolHead_t *)protocolBuff;
;;;754                            tmpCount = exchangeBytes(head->len)+4;
;;;755                            if (tmpCount >= MAX_PACKAGE_LEN || tmpCount <= 4)
;;;756                            {
;;;757                                protocolFlag = 0;
;;;758                                protocolCount = 0;
;;;759                                GIZWITS_LOG("ERR:the data length is too long or too small, will abandon \n");
;;;760                            }
;;;761                            if(protocolCount == tmpCount)
;;;762                            {
;;;763                                break;
;;;764                            }
;;;765                        }
;;;766                        
;;;767                    }
;;;768                }
;;;769    
;;;770                lastData = tmpData;
;;;771                debugCount++;
;;;772            }
;;;773        }
;;;774    
;;;775        if((protocolCount > 4) && (protocolCount == tmpCount))
;;;776        {
;;;777            sum = gizProtocolSum(protocolBuff, protocolCount);
;;;778    
;;;779            if(protocolBuff[protocolCount-1] == sum)
;;;780            {
;;;781                *len = tmpCount;
;;;782                protocolFlag = 0;
;;;783    
;;;784                protocolCount = 0;
;;;785                debugCount = 0;
;;;786                lastData = 0;
;;;787    
;;;788                return 0;
;;;789            }
;;;790            else
;;;791            {
;;;792                protocolFlag = 0;
;;;793                protocolCount = 0;
;;;794                return -2;
;;;795            }
;;;796        }
;;;797    
;;;798        return 1;
;;;799    }

;;;1403   */
;;;1404   static int8_t gizProtocolModuleInfoHandle(protocolHead_t *head)

;;;1406       protocolModuleInfo_t *moduleInfo = (protocolModuleInfo_t *)head;
000004  4625              MOV      r5,r4
;;;1407

;;;1409       {
;;;1410           GIZWITS_LOG("NTP is empty \n");

;;;1411           return -1;
00000e  f04f30ff          MOV      r0,#0xffffffff
                  |L14.18|
;;;1412       }
;;;1413   #if MODULE_TYPE
;;;1414       memcpy((uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.gprsInfoNews,(uint8_t *)&moduleInfo->gprsModuleInfo, sizeof(gprsInfo_t));
;;;1415   #else
;;;1416       memcpy((uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.wifiModuleNews,(uint8_t *)&moduleInfo->wifiModuleInfo, sizeof(moduleInfo_t));
;;;1417   #endif
;;;1418       gizwitsProtocol.moduleInfoEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.moduleInfoEvent.num] = MODULE_INFO;
;;;1419       gizwitsProtocol.moduleInfoEvent.num++;
;;;1420   
;;;1421       gizwitsProtocol.issuedFlag = GET_MODULEINFO_TYPE;
;;;1422   
;;;1423   
;;;1424       return 0;
;;;1425   }
000012  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L14.20|
000014  2241              MOVS     r2,#0x41              ;1416
000016  f1050108          ADD      r1,r5,#8              ;1416
00001a  480e              LDR      r0,|L14.84|
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy

000022  480d              LDR      r0,|L14.88|

                          AREA ||i.gizProtocolModuleStatus||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                          REQUIRE _printf_percent
                          REQUIRE _printf_d
                          REQUIRE _printf_int_dec
                  gizProtocolModuleStatus PROC
;;;1050   */
;;;1051   static int8_t gizProtocolModuleStatus(protocolWifiStatus_t *status)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1052   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1053       static wifiStatus_t lastStatus;
;;;1054   
;;;1055       if(NULL == status)
000004  b92c              CBNZ     r4,|L15.18|
;;;1056       {
;;;1057           GIZWITS_LOG("gizProtocolModuleStatus Error , Illegal Param\n");
000006  a0ca              ADR      r0,|L15.816|
000008  f7fffffe          BL       __2printf
;;;1058           return -1;
00000c  f04f30ff          MOV      r0,#0xffffffff
                  |L15.16|
;;;1059       }
;;;1060   
;;;1061       status->ststus.value = exchangeBytes(status->ststus.value);
;;;1062      
;;;1063       //OnBoarding mode status
;;;1064       if(lastStatus.types.onboarding != status->ststus.types.onboarding)
;;;1065       {
;;;1066           if(1 == status->ststus.types.onboarding)
;;;1067           {
;;;1068               if(1 == status->ststus.types.softap)
;;;1069               {
;;;1070                   gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_SOFTAP;
;;;1071                   gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1072                   GIZWITS_LOG("OnBoarding: SoftAP or Web mode\n");
;;;1073               }
;;;1074   
;;;1075               if(1 == status->ststus.types.station)
;;;1076               {
;;;1077                   gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_AIRLINK;
;;;1078                   gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1079                   GIZWITS_LOG("OnBoarding: AirLink mode\n");
;;;1080               }
;;;1081           }
;;;1082           else
;;;1083           {
;;;1084               if(1 == status->ststus.types.softap)
;;;1085               {
;;;1086                   gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_SOFTAP;
;;;1087                   gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1088                   GIZWITS_LOG("OnBoarding: SoftAP or Web mode\n");
;;;1089               }
;;;1090   
;;;1091               if(1 == status->ststus.types.station)
;;;1092               {
;;;1093                   gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_STATION;
;;;1094                   gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1095                   GIZWITS_LOG("OnBoarding: Station mode\n");
;;;1096               }
;;;1097           }
;;;1098       }
;;;1099   
;;;1100       //binding mode status
;;;1101       if(lastStatus.types.binding != status->ststus.types.binding)
;;;1102       {
;;;1103           lastStatus.types.binding = status->ststus.types.binding;
;;;1104           if(1 == status->ststus.types.binding)
;;;1105           {
;;;1106               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_OPEN_BINDING;
;;;1107               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1108               GIZWITS_LOG("WiFi status: in binding mode\n");
;;;1109           }
;;;1110           else
;;;1111           {
;;;1112               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_CLOSE_BINDING;
;;;1113               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1114               GIZWITS_LOG("WiFi status: out binding mode\n");
;;;1115           }
;;;1116       }
;;;1117   
;;;1118       //router status
;;;1119       if(lastStatus.types.con_route != status->ststus.types.con_route)
;;;1120       {
;;;1121           lastStatus.types.con_route = status->ststus.types.con_route;
;;;1122           if(1 == status->ststus.types.con_route)
;;;1123           {
;;;1124               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_CON_ROUTER;
;;;1125               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1126               GIZWITS_LOG("WiFi status: connected router\n");
;;;1127           }
;;;1128           else
;;;1129           {
;;;1130               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_DISCON_ROUTER;
;;;1131               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1132               GIZWITS_LOG("WiFi status: disconnected router\n");
;;;1133           }
;;;1134       }
;;;1135   
;;;1136       //M2M server status
;;;1137       if(lastStatus.types.con_m2m != status->ststus.types.con_m2m)
;;;1138       {
;;;1139           lastStatus.types.con_m2m = status->ststus.types.con_m2m;
;;;1140           if(1 == status->ststus.types.con_m2m)
;;;1141           {
;;;1142               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_CON_M2M;
;;;1143               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1144               GIZWITS_LOG("WiFi status: connected m2m\n");
;;;1145           }
;;;1146           else
;;;1147           {
;;;1148               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_DISCON_M2M;
;;;1149               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1150               GIZWITS_LOG("WiFi status: disconnected m2m\n");
;;;1151           }
;;;1152       }
;;;1153   
;;;1154       //APP status
;;;1155       if(lastStatus.types.app != status->ststus.types.app)
;;;1156       {
;;;1157           lastStatus.types.app = status->ststus.types.app;
;;;1158           if(1 == status->ststus.types.app)
;;;1159           {
;;;1160               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_CON_APP;
;;;1161               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1162               GIZWITS_LOG("WiFi status: app connect\n");
;;;1163           }
;;;1164           else
;;;1165           {
;;;1166               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_DISCON_APP;
;;;1167               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1168               GIZWITS_LOG("WiFi status: no app connect\n");
;;;1169           }
;;;1170       }
;;;1171   
;;;1172       //test mode status
;;;1173       if(lastStatus.types.test != status->ststus.types.test)
;;;1174       {
;;;1175           lastStatus.types.test = status->ststus.types.test;
;;;1176           if(1 == status->ststus.types.test)
;;;1177           {
;;;1178               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_OPEN_TESTMODE;
;;;1179               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1180               GIZWITS_LOG("WiFi status: in test mode\n");
;;;1181           }
;;;1182           else
;;;1183           {
;;;1184               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_CLOSE_TESTMODE;
;;;1185               gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1186               GIZWITS_LOG("WiFi status: out test mode\n");
;;;1187           }
;;;1188       }
;;;1189   
;;;1190       gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num] = WIFI_RSSI;
;;;1191       gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent.num++;
;;;1192       gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusData.rssi = status->ststus.types.rssi;
;;;1193       GIZWITS_LOG("RSSI is %d \n", gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusData.rssi);
;;;1194   
;;;1195       gizwitsProtocol.issuedFlag = WIFI_STATUS_TYPE;
;;;1196   
;;;1197       return 0;
;;;1198   }

                  |L15.18|

                          AREA ||i.gizProtocolNTP||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  gizProtocolNTP PROC
;;;1005   */
;;;1006   static int8_t gizProtocolNTP(protocolHead_t *head)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1007   {  
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1008       protocolUTT_t *UTTInfo = (protocolUTT_t *)head;
000004  4625              MOV      r5,r4
;;;1009       
;;;1010       if(NULL == head)
000006  b92c              CBNZ     r4,|L16.20|
;;;1011       {
;;;1012           GIZWITS_LOG("ERR: NTP is empty \n");
000008  a019              ADR      r0,|L16.112|
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       __2printf
;;;1013           return -1;
00000e  f04f30ff          MOV      r0,#0xffffffff
                  |L16.18|
;;;1014       }
;;;1015       
;;;1016       memcpy((uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.TimeNTP.year,(uint8_t *)UTTInfo->time, 7);
;;;1017       memcpy((uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.TimeNTP.ntp,(uint8_t *)UTTInfo->ntp_time, 4);
;;;1018       gizwitsProtocol.TimeNTP.year = exchangeBytes(gizwitsProtocol.TimeNTP.year);
;;;1019       gizwitsProtocol.TimeNTP.ntp =exchangeWord(gizwitsProtocol.TimeNTP.ntp);
;;;1020   
;;;1021       gizwitsProtocol.NTPEvent.event[gizwitsProtocol.NTPEvent.num] = WIFI_NTP;
;;;1022       gizwitsProtocol.NTPEvent.num++;
;;;1023       
;;;1024       gizwitsProtocol.issuedFlag = GET_NTP_TYPE;
;;;1025       
;;;1026       
;;;1027       return 0;
;;;1028   }
000012  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L16.20|
000014  481b              LDR      r0,|L16.132|
000016  68a9              LDR      r1,[r5,#8]            ;1016
000018  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;1016  ; gizwitsProtocol
00001a  89a9              LDRH     r1,[r5,#0xc]          ;1016
00001c  8081              STRH     r1,[r0,#4]            ;1016
00001e  7ba9              LDRB     r1,[r5,#0xe]          ;1016
000020  7181              STRB     r1,[r0,#6]            ;1016
000022  f5a070ac          SUB      r0,r0,#0x158          ;1017
000026  f8d5100f          LDR      r1,[r5,#0xf]          ;1017
00002a  f8c01160          STR      r1,[r0,#0x160]        ;1017
00002e  4601              MOV      r1,r0                 ;1018
000030  f8b10158          LDRH     r0,[r1,#0x158]        ;1018  ; gizwitsProtocol
000034  f7fffffe          BL       exchangeBytes
000038  4913              LDR      r1,|L16.136|
00003a  f8a10158          STRH     r0,[r1,#0x158]        ;1018
00003e  f8d10160          LDR      r0,[r1,#0x160]        ;1019
000042  f7fffffe          BL       exchangeWord
000046  4910              LDR      r1,|L16.136|
000048  f8c10160          STR      r0,[r1,#0x160]        ;1019
00004c  210e              MOVS     r1,#0xe               ;1021
00004e  480e              LDR      r0,|L16.136|
000050  f89020ef          LDRB     r2,[r0,#0xef]         ;1021  ; gizwitsProtocol
000054  30f0              ADDS     r0,r0,#0xf0           ;1021

000058  38f0              SUBS     r0,r0,#0xf0           ;1022

000066  2004              MOVS     r0,#4                 ;1024

00006a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1027
00006c  e7d1              B        |L16.18|
;;;1029   
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i.gizProtocolReboot||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  gizProtocolReboot PROC
;;;1035   */
;;;1036   static void gizProtocolReboot(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1037   {
;;;1038       uint32_t timeDelay = gizGetTimerCount();
000002  f7fffffe          BL       gizGetTimerCount
000006  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1039       
;;;1040       /*Wait 600ms*/
;;;1041       while((gizGetTimerCount() - timeDelay) <= 600);
000008  bf00              NOP      
                  |L17.10|
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       gizGetTimerCount
00000e  1b00              SUBS     r0,r0,r4
000010  f5b07f16          CMP      r0,#0x258
000014  d9f9              BLS      |L17.10|
;;;1042       mcuRestart();
000016  f7fffffe          BL       mcuRestart
;;;1043   }
00001a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1044   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.gizProtocolResendData||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  gizProtocolResendData PROC
;;;811    */
;;;812    static void gizProtocolResendData(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;813    {
;;;814        int32_t ret = 0;
000002  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;815    
;;;816        if(0 == gizwitsProtocol.waitAck.flag)
000004  480e              LDR      r0,|L18.64|
000006  f8900081          LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x81]
00000a  b900              CBNZ     r0,|L18.14|
                  |L18.12|
;;;817        {
;;;818            return;
;;;819        }
;;;820    
;;;821        GIZWITS_LOG("Warning: timeout, resend data \n");
;;;822        
;;;823        ret = uartWrite(gizwitsProtocol.waitAck.buf, gizwitsProtocol.waitAck.dataLen);
;;;824        if(ret != gizwitsProtocol.waitAck.dataLen)
;;;825        {
;;;826            GIZWITS_LOG("ERR: resend data error\n");
;;;827        }
;;;828    
;;;829        gizwitsProtocol.waitAck.sendTime = gizGetTimerCount();
;;;830    }
00000c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L18.14|
00000e  a00d              ADR      r0,|L18.68|
000010  f7fffffe          BL       __2printf
000014  480a              LDR      r0,|L18.64|
000016  f8b010bb          LDRH     r1,[r0,#0xbb]         ;823
00001a  3082              ADDS     r0,r0,#0x82           ;823
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       uartWrite
000020  4604              MOV      r4,r0                 ;823
000022  4807              LDR      r0,|L18.64|
000024  f8b000bb          LDRH     r0,[r0,#0xbb]         ;824
000028  42a0              CMP      r0,r4                 ;824
00002a  d002              BEQ      |L18.50|
00002c  a00d              ADR      r0,|L18.100|
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       __2printf
                  |L18.50|
000032  f7fffffe          BL       gizGetTimerCount
000036  4902              LDR      r1,|L18.64|
000038  f8c100bd          STR      r0,[r1,#0xbd]         ;829
00003c  bf00              NOP      
00003e  e7e5              B        |L18.12|
;;;831    
                          ENDP

                  |L18.64|
                          DCD      gizwitsProtocol
                  |L18.68|
000044  5761726e          DCB      "Warning: timeout, resend data \n",0

                          AREA ||i.gizProtocolWaitAck||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  gizProtocolWaitAck PROC
;;;90     */
;;;91     static int8_t gizProtocolWaitAck(uint8_t *gizdata, uint32_t len)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;92     {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;93         if(NULL == gizdata)
000006  b92c              CBNZ     r4,|L19.20|
;;;94         {
;;;95             GIZWITS_LOG("ERR: data is empty \n");
000008  a00f              ADR      r0,|L19.72|
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       __2printf
;;;96             return -1;
00000e  f04f30ff          MOV      r0,#0xffffffff
                  |L19.18|
;;;97         }
;;;98     
;;;99         memset((uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.waitAck, 0, sizeof(protocolWaitAck_t));
;;;100        memcpy((uint8_t *)gizwitsProtocol.waitAck.buf, gizdata, len);
;;;101        gizwitsProtocol.waitAck.dataLen = (uint16_t)len;
;;;102        
;;;103        gizwitsProtocol.waitAck.flag = 1;
;;;104        gizwitsProtocol.waitAck.sendTime = gizGetTimerCount();
;;;105    
;;;106        return 0;
;;;107    }
000012  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L19.20|
000014  2141              MOVS     r1,#0x41              ;99
000016  4812              LDR      r0,|L19.96|
000018  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr4
00001c  462a              MOV      r2,r5                 ;100

                          REQUIRE _printf_int_dec
                  gizReportData PROC

;;;606    static int32_t gizReportData(uint8_t action, uint8_t *gizdata, uint32_t len)

;;;607    {

;;;608        int32_t ret = 0;
00000c  f04f0900          MOV      r9,#0
;;;609        uint8_t tx_buf[MAX_PACKAGE_LEN];
;;;610    	uint8_t *pTxBuf = tx_buf;
000010  466c              MOV      r4,sp
;;;611        uint16_t data_len = 6 + len;
000012  f1080006          ADD      r0,r8,#6
000016  b285              UXTH     r5,r0
;;;612        if(NULL == gizdata)
000018  b93f              CBNZ     r7,|L22.42|
;;;613        {
;;;614            GIZWITS_LOG("gizReportData Error , Illegal Param\n");
00001a  a024              ADR      r0,|L22.172|
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       __2printf
;;;615            return -1;
000020  f04f30ff          MOV      r0,#0xffffffff
                  |L22.36|
;;;616        }
;;;617    
;;;618        *pTxBuf ++= 0xFF;
;;;619        *pTxBuf ++= 0xFF;
;;;620        *pTxBuf ++= (uint8_t)(data_len>>8);
;;;621        *pTxBuf ++= (uint8_t)(data_len);
;;;622        *pTxBuf ++= CMD_REPORT_P0;
;;;623        *pTxBuf ++= gizwitsProtocol.sn++;
;;;624        *pTxBuf ++= 0x00;
;;;625        *pTxBuf ++= 0x00;
;;;626        *pTxBuf ++= action;
;;;627    
;;;628        memcpy(&tx_buf[9],gizdata,len);
;;;629        
;;;630        tx_buf[data_len + 4 - 1 ] = gizProtocolSum( tx_buf , (data_len+4));
;;;631        
;;;632        ret = uartWrite(tx_buf, data_len+4);
;;;633        if(ret < 0)
;;;634        {
;;;635            GIZWITS_LOG("ERR: uart write error %d \n", ret);
;;;636            return -2;
;;;637        }
;;;638    
;;;639        gizProtocolWaitAck(tx_buf, data_len+4);
;;;640    
;;;641        return 0;

                          AREA ||i.gizwitsHandle||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                          REQUIRE _printf_percent
                          REQUIRE _printf_x
                          REQUIRE _printf_longlong_hex
                  gizwitsHandle PROC
;;;1434   */
;;;1435   int32_t gizwitsHandle(dataPoint_t *currentData)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1436   {
000004  b0a0              SUB      sp,sp,#0x80
000006  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;1437       int8_t ret = 0;
000008  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;1438   #ifdef PROTOCOL_DEBUG
;;;1439       uint16_t i = 0;
;;;1440   #endif
;;;1441       uint8_t ackData[RB_MAX_LEN];
;;;1442       uint16_t protocolLen = 0;
00000a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000c  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
;;;1443       uint32_t ackLen = 0;
00000e  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;1444       protocolHead_t *recvHead = NULL;
000010  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;1445       char *didPtr = NULL;
000012  4680              MOV      r8,r0
;;;1446       uint16_t offset = 0;
000014  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
;;;1447       
;;;1448   
;;;1449       if(NULL == currentData)
000016  b935              CBNZ     r5,|L25.38|
;;;1450       {
;;;1451           GIZWITS_LOG("GizwitsHandle Error , Illegal Param\n");
000018  a082              ADR      r0,|L25.548|
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       __2printf
;;;1452           return -1;
00001e  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
                  |L25.32|
;;;1453       }
;;;1454   
;;;1455       /*resend strategy*/
;;;1456       gizProtocolAckHandle();
;;;1457       ret = gizProtocolGetOnePacket(&pRb, gizwitsProtocol.protocolBuf, &protocolLen);
;;;1458   
;;;1459       if(0 == ret)
;;;1460       {
;;;1461           GIZWITS_LOG("Get One Packet!\n");
;;;1462           
;;;1463   #ifdef PROTOCOL_DEBUG
;;;1464           GIZWITS_LOG("WiFi2MCU[%4d:%4d]: ", gizGetTimerCount(), protocolLen);
;;;1465           for(i=0; i<protocolLen;i++)
;;;1466           {
;;;1467               GIZWITS_LOG("%02x ", gizwitsProtocol.protocolBuf[i]);
;;;1468           }
;;;1469           GIZWITS_LOG("\n");
;;;1470   #endif
;;;1471   
;;;1472           recvHead = (protocolHead_t *)gizwitsProtocol.protocolBuf;
;;;1473           switch (recvHead->cmd)
;;;1474           {
;;;1475               case CMD_GET_DEVICE_INTO:
;;;1476                   gizProtocolGetDeviceInfo(recvHead);
;;;1477                   break;
;;;1478               case CMD_ISSUED_P0:
;;;1479                   GIZWITS_LOG("flag %x %x \n", recvHead->flags[0], recvHead->flags[1]);
;;;1480                   //offset = 1;
;;;1481                  
;;;1482                   if(0 == gizProtocolIssuedProcess(didPtr, gizwitsProtocol.protocolBuf+sizeof(protocolHead_t)+offset, protocolLen-(sizeof(protocolHead_t)+offset+1), ackData, &ackLen))
;;;1483                   {
;;;1484                       gizProtocolIssuedDataAck(recvHead, ackData, ackLen,recvHead->flags[1]);
;;;1485                       GIZWITS_LOG("AckData : \n");
;;;1486                   }
;;;1487                   break;
;;;1488               case CMD_HEARTBEAT:
;;;1489                   gizProtocolCommonAck(recvHead);
;;;1490                   break;
;;;1491               case CMD_WIFISTATUS:
;;;1492                   gizProtocolCommonAck(recvHead);
;;;1493                   gizProtocolModuleStatus((protocolWifiStatus_t *)recvHead);
;;;1494                   break;
;;;1495               case ACK_REPORT_P0:
;;;1496               case ACK_WIFI_CONFIG:
;;;1497               case ACK_SET_DEFAULT:
;;;1498               case ACK_NINABLE_MODE:
;;;1499               case ACK_REBOOT_MODULE:
;;;1500                   gizProtocolWaitAckCheck(recvHead);
;;;1501                   break;
;;;1502               case CMD_MCU_REBOOT:
;;;1503                   gizProtocolCommonAck(recvHead);
;;;1504                   GIZWITS_LOG("report:MCU reboot!\n");
;;;1505                   
;;;1506                   gizProtocolReboot();
;;;1507                   break;
;;;1508               case CMD_ERROR_PACKAGE:
;;;1509                   break;
;;;1510               case ACK_PRODUCTION_TEST:
;;;1511                   gizProtocolWaitAckCheck(recvHead);
;;;1512                   GIZWITS_LOG("Ack PRODUCTION_MODE success \n");
;;;1513                   break;           
;;;1514               case ACK_GET_NTP:
;;;1515                   gizProtocolWaitAckCheck(recvHead);
;;;1516                   gizProtocolNTP(recvHead);
;;;1517                   GIZWITS_LOG("Ack GET_UTT success \n");
;;;1518                   break; 
;;;1519               case ACK_ASK_MODULE_INFO:
;;;1520                   gizProtocolWaitAckCheck(recvHead);
;;;1521                   gizProtocolModuleInfoHandle(recvHead);
;;;1522                   GIZWITS_LOG("Ack GET_Module success \n");
;;;1523                   break;
;;;1524    
;;;1525               default:
;;;1526                   gizProtocolErrorCmd(recvHead,ERROR_CMD);
;;;1527                   GIZWITS_LOG("ERR: cmd code error!\n");
;;;1528                   break;
;;;1529           }
;;;1530       }
;;;1531       else if(-2 == ret)
;;;1532       {
;;;1533           //Check failed, report exception
;;;1534           recvHead = (protocolHead_t *)gizwitsProtocol.protocolBuf;
;;;1535           gizProtocolErrorCmd(recvHead,ERROR_ACK_SUM);
;;;1536           GIZWITS_LOG("ERR: check sum error!\n");
;;;1537           return -2;
;;;1538       }
;;;1539       
;;;1540       switch(gizwitsProtocol.issuedFlag)
;;;1541       {
;;;1542           case ACTION_CONTROL_TYPE:
;;;1543               gizwitsProtocol.issuedFlag = STATELESS_TYPE;
;;;1544               gizwitsEventProcess(&gizwitsProtocol.issuedProcessEvent, (uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.gizCurrentDataPoint, sizeof(dataPoint_t));
;;;1545               memset((uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.issuedProcessEvent,0x0,sizeof(gizwitsProtocol.issuedProcessEvent));  
;;;1546               break;
;;;1547           case WIFI_STATUS_TYPE:
;;;1548               gizwitsProtocol.issuedFlag = STATELESS_TYPE;
;;;1549               gizwitsEventProcess(&gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent, (uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusData, sizeof(moduleStatusInfo_t));
;;;1550               memset((uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent,0x0,sizeof(gizwitsProtocol.wifiStatusEvent));
;;;1551               break;
;;;1552           case ACTION_W2D_TRANSPARENT_TYPE:
;;;1553               gizwitsProtocol.issuedFlag = STATELESS_TYPE;
;;;1554               gizwitsEventProcess(&gizwitsProtocol.issuedProcessEvent, (uint8_t *)gizwitsProtocol.transparentBuff, gizwitsProtocol.transparentLen);
;;;1555               break;
;;;1556           case GET_NTP_TYPE:
;;;1557               gizwitsProtocol.issuedFlag = STATELESS_TYPE;
;;;1558               gizwitsEventProcess(&gizwitsProtocol.NTPEvent, (uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.TimeNTP, sizeof(protocolTime_t));
;;;1559               memset((uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.NTPEvent,0x0,sizeof(gizwitsProtocol.NTPEvent));
;;;1560               break;
;;;1561           case GET_MODULEINFO_TYPE:
;;;1562               gizwitsProtocol.issuedFlag = STATELESS_TYPE;
;;;1563               gizwitsEventProcess(&gizwitsProtocol.moduleInfoEvent, (uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.wifiModuleNews, sizeof(moduleInfo_t));
;;;1564               memset((uint8_t *)&gizwitsProtocol.moduleInfoEvent,0x0,sizeof(moduleInfo_t));
;;;1565               break;
;;;1566           default:
;;;1567               break;      
;;;1568       }
;;;1569    
;;;1570       gizDevReportPolicy(currentData);
;;;1571    
;;;1572       return 0;
;;;1573   }

                          AREA ||i.gizwitsPassthroughData||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                          REQUIRE _printf_percent
                          REQUIRE _printf_d
                          REQUIRE _printf_int_dec
                  gizwitsPassthroughData PROC
;;;1583   */
;;;1584   int32_t gizwitsPassthroughData(uint8_t * gizdata, uint32_t len)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1585   {
000004  b090              SUB      sp,sp,#0x40
000006  4606              MOV      r6,r0
000008  460f              MOV      r7,r1
;;;1586   	int32_t ret = 0;
00000a  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0
;;;1587   	uint8_t tx_buf[MAX_PACKAGE_LEN];
;;;1588   	uint8_t *pTxBuf = tx_buf;
00000e  ac01              ADD      r4,sp,#4
;;;1589   	uint16_t data_len = 6+len;

000012  b285              UXTH     r5,r0
;;;1590       if(NULL == gizdata)
000014  b93e              CBNZ     r6,|L27.38|
;;;1591       {

;;;1593           return (-1);
00001c  f04f30ff          MOV      r0,#0xffffffff
                  |L27.32|
;;;1594       }

;;;1597   	*pTxBuf ++= 0xFF;

;;;1603   	*pTxBuf ++= 0x00;//flag

;;;1616
